infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeCycle needs your location to calculate safe cycling routes and alert you to nearby hazards.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeCycle uses background location to monitor your route and send safety alerts even when the app is minimised.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeCycle uses background location to monitor your route and send safety alerts even when the app is minimised.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeCycle uses your location in the background to alert you to intersections and hazards during navigation.
